nasb.text: So you shall remove the guilt of innocent blood from your midst, when you do what is right in the eyes of the Lord.

esv.text: So you shall purge the guilt of innocent blood from your midst, when you do what is right in the sight of the Lord.

cnv.text: 如果你行耶和華看為正的事，就可以從你中間除掉流無辜人的血的罪了。

ccb.text: 你们做耶和华视为正的事，就可以从你们中间除去杀害无辜之人的罪。
